parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id, title, tldr, summary_bullets, deep_dive_markdown,
  topics, geo, freedom_relevance_score, credibility_score,
  citations, status, published_url, published_at, created_at
FROM insights 
WHERE status = 'published' 
  AND published_at >= $1::timestamptz 
  AND published_at <= $2::timestamptz
ORDER BY freedom_relevance_score DESC, published_at DESC

SELECT 
  id, derived_from_insight_ids, problem_statement, threat_model,
  affected_groups, proposed_solution, mvp_scope, misuse_risks,
  feasibility_score, impact_score, status, github_issue_url,
  technical_dependencies, suggested_stack, prior_art, open_questions,
  created_at, updated_at
FROM project_ideas 
WHERE created_at >= $1::timestamptz 
  AND created_at <= $2::timestamptz
  AND status IN ('new', 'triaged', 'build_candidate')
ORDER BY impact_score DESC, feasibility_score DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ON (id)
  id, period_start, period_end, insight_count, tldr,
  top_topics, published_url, published_at, created_at
FROM digests 
WHERE published_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 months'
ORDER BY id, published_at DESC

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: $('Build Tree Entries').first().json._github.commitMessage, tree: $json.sha, parents: [$('Build Tree Entries').first().json._parentCommitSha] }) }}

parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Build Tree Entries').first().json._github.owner }}/{{ $('Build Tree Entries').first().json._github.repo }}/git/refs/heads/{{ $('Build Tree Entries').first().json._github.branch }}
